exemplar.title: What is the relationship between personal experience and knowledge?

detailedExemplarData.title: What is the relationship between personal experience and knowledge?

strengths: Clearly identifies three specific real-world objects and situates them in detailed contexts
Explicit and well-explained links between each object and IA Prompt 20
Justifications for inclusion are mostly evidence-based with direct references to the prompt
Insightful analysis (e.g., language and cultural context, Indigenous stewardship, physics in sailing) that deepens the TOK relevance
weaknesses: Some explanations remain somewhat general and could be more precise
The cedar tree image is generic rather than a uniquely identified specimen
Source citations are incomplete or inconsistent, weakening evidentiary support
Limited explicit use of TOK terminology (ways of knowing, frameworks) in some sections
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: The work meets the 7â8 band by clearly identifying three objects and their contexts, offering strong, mostly evidence-based links to the IA prompt, and providing coherent justifications for inclusion. The insightful cultural, environmental and scientific analyses demonstrate how personal experience shapes knowledge. However, minor shortcomingsâsuch as a generic image, incomplete citations and occasional lack of TOK terminologyâprevent the submission from reaching the 9â10 band. An overall score of 8 accurately reflects the submissionâs high quality while accounting for these small gaps.

annotations.comment: Your analysis of language and cultural context is insightful and effectively demonstrates how personal experience can amplify knowledge acquisition.
The paragraph ends abruptly with an unfinished sentence. Revise to complete the thought and strengthen the connection to your knowledge question.
This summary claim would be stronger if it explicitly referenced IA Prompt 20 and identified which ways of knowing are most impacted by related experiences.

The exhibitionâs prompt is clearly stated, directly framing the relationship between personal experience and knowledge. This strong clarity ensures the objects are coherently linked to the IA prompt.
The cover image is visually engaging but could better reflect the TOK theme; consider selecting or annotating an image that directly alludes to personal experience shaping knowledge.
The inclusion of the date adds little to the TOK argument; consider removing or relocating administrative details to avoid distraction from your analysis.
The introduction defines personal experience and knowledge but lacks explicit reference to TOK terminology and frameworks; integrate key concepts like ways of knowing to deepen the analysis.
Object 1 is clearly identified with specific real-world context (the Parasite poster) and linked to the IA prompt via personal linguistic and cultural experience.
The film description accurately summarizes the plot but would benefit from explicit linkage to ways of knowing (e.g., emotion, language) to deepen the TOK relevance.
The Western red cedar image is generic rather than a particular named specimen; specifying a distinct tree would strengthen the real-world context per rubric requirements.
The cultural context of Indigenous stewardship is articulated well, grounding the object in a clear community practice and enriching its TOK relevance.
The normative claim about environmental duty is interesting but lacks explicit TOK analysis; integrate ways of knowing or ethical frameworks to support it.
The consideration of economic motives via a utilitarian lens adds depth by showing contrasting knowledge perspectives.
This concluding sentence summarises but does not extend analysis; consider adding explicit links back to your knowledge question and the IA prompt.
The object label contains a typo (âplagueâ instead of âplaqueâ), which distracts from your TOK analysis and should be corrected.
The context of the Pumpkin Bowl Regatta is clear but would gain credibility with details such as date, location, or the yacht clubâs name.
Your application of physics concepts to sailing is insightful and clearly demonstrates how prior theoretical knowledge enriches personal experience.
The counterpoint on intuitive sailing is well-argued; explicitly connect this discussion back to IA Prompt 20 to reinforce the TOK focus.
The first works-cited entry omits the directorâs name and film studio; ensure citations are complete to support your evidence.
The citation for Huang is incomplete and interrupted mid-sentence; provide full source details to validate your Indigenous stewardship claims.
Citation formats vary (URLs versus authorâdate); adopt a consistent style (MLA, APA or Chicago) to strengthen academic rigor.
The works-cited page does not include a reference for the Pumpkin Bowl Regatta plaque; add a source to support the third objectâs context.

strands.name: Does the exhibition successfully show how TOK manifests in the world around us?
strands.content: The exhibition does not reach the standard described by the other levels or does not use one of the IA prompts provided.

strands.name: Does the exhibition successfully show how TOK manifests in the world around us?
strands.content:
The exhibition presents
three objects, but the
real-world contexts of
these objects are not
stated, or the images
presented may be
highly generic images of

than of specific

between the objects

strands.name: Does the exhibition successfully show how TOK manifests in the world around us?
strands.content: The exhibition identifies three objects, although the real-world contexts of the objects may be implied rather than explicitly stated. Basic links between the objects and the selected IA prompt are made, but the explanation of these links is unconvincing and/or unfocused. There is a superficial justification for the inclusion of each object in the exhibition. Reasons for the inclusion of the objects are offered, but these are not supported by appropriate evidence and/or lack relevance to the selected IA prompt. There may be significant repetition across the justifications of the different objects

strands.name: Does the exhibition successfully show how TOK manifests in the world around us?
strands.content: The exhibition identifies three objects, although the real-world contexts of these objects may be vaguely or imprecisely stated. There is some explanation of the links between the three objects and the selected IA prompt. There is some justification for the inclusion of each object in the exhibition. Some of the points are supported by evidence and references to the selected IA prompt.

strands.name: Does the exhibition successfully show how TOK manifests in the world around us?
strands.content: The exhibition identifies three objects and their real-world contexts. Links between each of the three objects and the selected IA prompt are explained, although this explanation may lack precision and clarity in parts. There is a justification of the contribution that each individual object makes to the exhibition. Many of the points are supported by appropriate evidence and references to the selected IA prompt.

strands.name: Does the exhibition successfully show how TOK manifests in the world around us?
strands.content: The exhibition clearly identifies three objects and their specific real-world contexts. Links between each of the three objects and the selected IA prompt are clearly made and well-explained. There is a strong justification of the particular contribution that each individual object makes to the exhibition. All, or nearly all, of the points are well-supported by appropriate evidence and explicit references to the selected IA prompt.
